title: atocion armeria var. lituanicum
intro: Atocion armeria var. lituanicum, also known as Lithuanian thyme or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Eastern Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Atocion armeria var. lituanicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
